title: Mission envelope record and budgets
goal: Implement AF-02 from docs/roadmap/auto-frontier/03-mission-envelope.md. Add a durable per-run MissionEnvelope and FrontierBudgetState that are recorded at run start, survive restart/resume, render through shared status/watch/monitor/report/handoff projections, and grant no authority yet. Autonomy levels above off are recorded only and behave as off until later slices.
acceptance: Run start can record a validated MissionEnvelope with goal, allowed_areas, non_goals, verify_profile, max_auto_promotions, max_depth, max_generated_slices, autonomy_level, and must_ask_if.
Envelope and budget counters are durable run state, survive daemon restart/resume, and are included in status/watch/monitor/report/handoff from the shared projection.
Allowed areas reuse the literal-prefix area contract; invalid envelopes are rejected before worker launch with exact validation errors.
Runs without an envelope remain backward-compatible and behave as autonomy off.
No classifier, proposal decision, proposal apply, queue mutation, or auto-authority behavior is introduced.
must_ask_if: If the implementation would create a second proposal, decision, or apply authority channel outside the existing replan mechanism, stop and ask.
If required runtime behavior cannot be implemented within the declared areas, stop and ask rather than widening scope silently.
If a dependency or prerequisite from docs/roadmap/auto-frontier/00-matrix.md is not satisfied, stop and report the blocker.
If implementing envelope support would require envelope mutation mid-run or a standing cross-run envelope, stop and ask.
